segments.text: Usually I think I've got a pretty solid feel for that kind of thing
segments.original_text: 普段だと思う 僕のそれなりにあるとかそういう感じだと

segments.text: Since it lasts so long, we're going for the punish
segments.original_text: 持続が長いから 狙っていくみたいな

full_text: Usually I think I've got a pretty solid feel for that kind of thing Since it lasts so long, we're going for the punish
